name: RatingDetails
title: NDH Rating Details
description: This extension enables NDH to carry supplemental rating metadata, including rating system, rating type, and rating value, so implementer-defined scoring models can be represented with clearer provenance and meaning; it is used as a nested extension within base-ext-rating.

element.definition: This extension enables NDH to carry supplemental rating metadata, including rating system, rating type, and rating value, so implementer-defined scoring models can be represented with clearer provenance and meaning; it is used as a nested extension within base-ext-rating.

element.short: URL to a specific rating system
element.comment: The rating system can be any URL that defines the semantics of the rating, such as a specific scoring rubric or evaluation framework. By providing a URL, you can link to a detailed definition of the rating system being used, allowing for better understanding and interoperability when sharing ratings across different systems or organizations.

element.short: URL to a specific rating type
element.comment: The rating type can be any URL that specifies the particular aspect or dimension being rated, such as quality, satisfaction, or performance. By using a URL, you can provide a clear and standardized reference to the specific rating type, enabling consistent interpretation and comparison of ratings across different contexts and systems.

element.short: Rating Value either Text or Number
element.comment: The rating value can be either a textual description or a quantitative measure, depending on the nature of the rating system and type.
